'''zathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:needily|needily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:needily|needily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zathate|zathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zathatesher|zathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zathatesherĂ«m|zathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zathatero|zathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zathateshĂ«|zathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zathateshĂ«m|zathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizathatero|gokizathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizathateshĂ«|gokizathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizathateshĂ«m|gokizathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozathankerom|gozathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozathankeshĂ«|gozathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozathankeshĂ«m|gozathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozathankeya|gozathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zathaterom|zathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zathatemu|zathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zathateya|zathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizathaterom|gokizathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizathatemu|gokizathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizathateya|gokizathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zathathate|zathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zathathatesher|zathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zathathatesherĂ«m|zathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zathathatero|zathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zathathateshĂ«|zathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zathathateshĂ«m|zathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizathathatero|gokizathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizathathateshĂ«|gokizathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizathathateshĂ«m|gokizathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozathathankerom|gozathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozathathankeshĂ«|gozathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozathathankeshĂ«m|gozathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozathathankeya|gozathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zathathaterom|zathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zathathatemu|zathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zathathateya|zathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizathathaterom|gokizathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizathathatemu|gokizathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizathathateya|gokizathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠthĂŠte|zĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠthĂŠtesher|zĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠthĂŠtero|zĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠthĂŠtero|gokizĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠthĂŠterom|zĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠthĂŠtemu|zĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠthĂŠteya|zĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠthĂŠterom|gokizĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠthĂŠteya|gokizĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafthafte|zafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafthaftesher|zafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafthaftesherĂ«m|zafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafthaftero|zafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafthafteshĂ«|zafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafthafteshĂ«m|zafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafthaftero|gokizafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafthafteshĂ«|gokizafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafthafteshĂ«m|gokizafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafthafnkerom|gozafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafthafnkeshĂ«|gozafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafthafnkeshĂ«m|gozafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafthafnkeya|gozafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafthafterom|zafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafthaftemu|zafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafthafteya|zafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafthafterom|gokizafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafthaftemu|gokizafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafthafteya|gokizafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
